subject: We are being tested
body: Minister — each unanswered probe teaches them that the next slice is free. I recommend we demonstrate resolve before the pattern hardens.

subject: Mind the spiral
body: A visible build-up may read as offensive and provoke exactly the reaction we fear. Consider whether reassurance would buy us more than another destroyer.

subject: Quarterly intelligence summary
body: Minister — this quarter's estimates are reproduced below; they are the same reads shown on your Situation Report. Confidence tracks our collection posture: raise the Intelligence track and the error bars narrow permanently, or task a one-off surge to sharpen next quarter's read.

responseOptions.label: Task additional collection (−1 PC): sharpen next quarter's estimates.

subject: On the status of the approaches
body: Our patience with your 'administration' of waters that were always ours is not unlimited. Prudence would counsel accommodation.

subject: Historic questions cannot wait forever
body: Domestic opinion demands resolution within this generation. We would prefer it be peaceful — but the timetable is not ours to set.

subject: Your intentions are unclear to us
body: Your forward deployments encircle us. We arm because we must, not because we wish to. Clarify your aims and we may yet step back.
